song.title: Of All the Gits Thy Love Bestows
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Of all the gifts Thy love bestows, Thou Giver of all good! E’en heav’n itself no richer knows Than Jesus and His blood.
[V2] 2) Faith, too, that trusts In Him through grace, From that same love we gain; Else, sweetly as it suits our case, The gift had been in vain.
[V3] 3) O Love divine, Thou vast abyss! Our sins entombed in Thee, And covered our unrighteousness, From all debts we are free.
[V4] 4) In Jesus’ blood our hearts can trace The footprints of Thy love, And know the riches of Thy grace, The holy righteousness.
[V5] 5) Though heart may fail and flesh decay, We grounded firm remain; When earth and heav’n shall pass away, Our anchor shall sustain.
[V6] 6) Until that day, we all confirm, The virtue of Thy love. While here on earth, our utmost need, Thy great sustaining pow’r.
[V7] 7) We praise Thee, And would praise Thee more, To Thee our all we owe: The precious Savior, and the pow’r That makes Him precious too.
song.author: William Cowper, John Stevenson
